title: 'Congress' Slogan is Family First, Looks After Selfish Interests': PM Modi in Assam
description: PM Modi lauded the NDA government's efforts to maintain electricity supply in the district. Calling Assam a model state in terms of electricity, he noted that the Centre has provided Rs 70,000 to 80,000 under PM Surya Ghar Muft Yojana to install solar panels.
